_comment: Editorial content lives here. Release version, date, download link, telegram, changelog etc. are fetched live at runtime from the URLs in 'remote' below and will override the matching fields here if the fetch succeeds. The fields under latestRelease/changelog/links act only as an offline fallback (e.g. if the remote source is briefly unreachable).

remote._comment: Live data sources for this device. Point these at your own plato.json / changelog.txt to switch devices.

rom.name: crDroid
rom.tagline: Custom Android firmware built for speed, privacy and a clean, distraction-free experience.

latestRelease.summary: The newest crDroid build for plato. See the full changelog below for everything that changed.

changes: Improved refresh rate behavior for smoother animations and scrolling
Enabled advanced ZRAM and UFS performance optimizations for better multitasking
Enabled Zero Shutter Lag (ZSL) support for faster camera capture

installGuide._comment: Fully data-driven install guide — works for any ROM/device. 'linkRef' on a requirement points at a key in 'links' below so it always matches the Downloads button; use 'url' instead for a one-off link that doesn't belong in 'links'.
installGuide.warning: You are responsible for your own actions and device. Neither the ROM developer nor the author of this guide is responsible for any damage, data loss, or other issues that may occur during the installation process.
prerequisites: The engineering firmware preloader must be flashed before installing the ROM.
installGuide.importantNote: Flashing the engineering firmware preloader is strongly recommended. It provides an additional recovery path and may allow restoring stock firmware without requiring service center assistance if something goes wrong.

steps.title: Flash the Engineering Firmware Preloader
steps.description: Boot the device into Fastboot mode by holding Volume Down + Power until the FASTBOOT screen appears. Flash the preloader:

alternative.note: If the commands fail, use the alternative partition names:

steps.title: Flash Boot Images
steps.note: The device should now boot into Recovery.

steps.title: Format Data
steps.important: Formatting data is required when installing the ROM.

steps.title: Flash crDroid
steps.note: If Recovery prompts for a reboot at approximately 47%, confirm it.

steps.title: Flash GApps (Optional)
steps.description: If you require Google services, flash the GApps package after installing the ROM:

steps.title: Reboot
steps.note: Complete the Android setup process and enjoy crDroid.
